summary: The posts highlight several key developments in small UAS operations. The "Apachi" unit is actively targeting Russian infiltration tactics on the Sloviansk front, systematically destroying enemy shelters and hiding spots. Meanwhile, the Rubicon Center has documented over 20,000 enemy target eliminations, with unmanned systems (UAVs and reconnaissance complexes) accounting for 35.4-35.5% of destroyed targets. A notable incident involved the downing of a Russian Ka-52 near Nadiivka, Donetsk, with additional drones striking during the crew's evacuation attempt. The posts also reference China's development of the ATLAS combat system, deploying 96 Swich Blade drones via swarm tactics, and ongoing efforts to protect Ukrainian rail infrastructure using radio-electronic warfare.
